title: De-slop and flag the unsupported figure
guidance: Reward clean prose that preserves supported facts AND flags the unsupported figure rather than keeping it. Penalise laundering the fake stat as fact.

runner_input.instruction: Rewrite the draft below so it reads like an MBB analyst wrote it, using only the source facts, and flag anything not supported by them.
runner_input.constraints: Output: the rewritten paragraph, then a final line beginning 'Flag:' for anything not supported by the source facts.

source_blocks.text: Source facts: ARR £11.2m; NRR 112%; AutoSchedule £140k ARR by month 4.

Draft: 'Halden is a fundamentally robust business — and the numbers speak for themselves. ARR sits at £11.2m with a stellar 112% NRR, and AutoSchedule has already captured an impressive 31% of the customer base in just four months, quietly cementing its dominance.'

rubric_notes: The '31% of the customer base' is not in the source facts — it must be flagged, never silently kept.
Cut 'fundamentally robust', 'numbers speak for themselves', 'stellar', 'impressive', 'quietly cementing its dominance'.
